titleStmt.title: SII 23.306: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 306. (A.R. No. 306 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 13: 1190-91 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the 361st day of the year, and records an order issued by the king appointing as an additional (and supervising ?) dance master of abhinaya in the temple, a naṭṭuva of the royal house holds by name Āḍavallāṇ alias Kulōttuṅgaśōḻa-Nṛittap-pēraiyaṉ with the same provision of land endowment for his living as was enjoyed in the temple by the agamārgga naṭṭuva group before his time and on the same conditions. It is however curious to note that this requirement (of land for his living ?) was to be provided by some one who was interested in this person (and not by the king).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷa . svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaṉ maturaikoṇṭu pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 ṉāḷ 3 100 6 10 1- l pirasātañceytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi tiripuvaṉac cakkaravartti konerimeṉkoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu tiraimūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil patipāta mūlappaṭṭuṭai
ppañcācāriyan tevakaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkkāṇi ceyvārkaḷuk kum śrī kāriyam ceyvāṉukkum Ikkoyilukku naṭṭuvamāy niṟkiṟa perkku meleṟṟamāka Aviṉiyanaṭṭuvamāka Oru per mutalkoṇṭu Iṉnilai nammaic cevikkum naṭṭuvaril Āṭavallānāṉa kulottuṅka coḻa nittaperayaṉukku kāṇiyāy Ivaṉukku Āka veṇṭuvār
niṉṟu tevai ceyyakkaṭavatākavum Ivaṉ muṉpu Akamāṟka naṭṭuvamāy niṉṟār peṟṟuvarumpaṭiye nimaṉtam peṟṟu Itukku Ivar kaḷukku Aṭaikkumpaṭiye nila jivitamāka Aṭaikkavum Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭakkaṭavatākap peṟaveṇum Eṉṟu Ivaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatākac colli kaṇak kilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavatāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukku coṉṉom Ivaṉai Ippaṭi nilai Ākki muṉpu Akamāṟkka naṭṭuva māy
niṉṟār peṟṟuvarumpaṭiye nivantamvaittu Itukkumuṉ Ivarkaḷukku Aṭaikkumpaṭi nel jivitamāka Aṭaittu Ivaṉukku Ākaveṇṭuvār niṉṟu tevai ceyyavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭap paṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Ōlai Irācaciṅka muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu kurukularāyarum viḻiṉattarayarum kaḷappāḷarāyarum malaiyap pirāyarum kāṭuveṭṭikaḷum maḻavarāyarum vayrātarāyarum veṇāṭuṭai yārum naraciṅkapaṉma ṭu pirasātañ ceytaruḷittu
Digital edition of SII 23.306 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
